prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical studio portrait of an adult East Asian woman in her twenties, centered against a completely black background, with a dramatic theme of light and shadow. She has a short dark-brown bob haircut with thin bangs, natural makeup, soft glossy skin, and a calm, slightly mysterious half-smile while looking directly into the camera. Pose her with one hand raised gently to her lips, fingers curled near her mouth, creating an intimate but tasteful expression. Dress her in a sleeveless white satin cheongsam-inspired top with subtle floral jacquard texture, a high Mandarin collar, frog-button closures, and a teardrop keyhole neckline. Use a single narrow spotlight from the upper left/front to illuminate her face, hair highlights, hand, shoulder, and the shimmering fabric, leaving the rest of the body and background in deep black shadow. Emphasize high contrast chiaroscuro lighting, realistic skin texture, catchlights in the eyes, glossy fabric reflections, shallow depth of field, cinematic low-key photography, 85mm portrait lens look, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark. Customize with adult East Asian woman in her twenties, short dark-brown bob with thin bangs, white satin cheongsam-inspired sleeveless top, dramatic narrow spotlight in deep black shadow, and calm mysterious half-smile.

promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的竖构图摄影棚人像，主角为一名 20 多岁的东亚女性，居中置于全黑背景前，呈现出戏剧性的光影主题。她留着深棕色短波波头，配有薄刘海，妆容自然，皮肤质感柔和光泽，神情平静，带着一丝神秘的浅笑直视镜头。姿势设定为一只手轻轻抬起至唇边，手指微蜷，营造出亲密而优雅的氛围。她身着无袖白色缎面旗袍风格上衣，带有精致的提花纹理、高立领、盘扣以及水滴形领口。使用从左上方/前方射入的单束窄光，照亮她的面部、发丝高光、手部、肩部以及闪烁的布料，其余身体和背景则隐没在深邃的黑色阴影中。强调高对比度的明暗对照法照明、真实的皮肤纹理、眼神光、光泽布料反射、浅景深、电影感低调摄影、85mm 人像镜头效果、2:3 竖构图，无文字，无水印。可通过以下参数自定义：20 多岁的东亚女性，深棕色短波波头配薄刘海，白色缎面旗袍风格无袖上衣，深黑阴影中的戏剧性窄聚光灯，以及 平静神秘的浅笑。
